text:
(In reply to Vanilla I. Shu from comment #13)
> Hi: 
> 
> any reason to set py-ipaddress' MAINTAINER as "phihag@phihag.de",
> and py-tabulate's MAINTAINER as 's.astanin@gmail.com'?
>

> author.
> 
> right?

Fixed
